home.title: Non-profit artistic association.
home.paragraph1: We are a growing collective whose main goal is to organize events related to Hip Hop culture,
home.paragraph2: giving opportunities and offering spaces to anyone who wants to express their art with total freedom.
home.paragraph3: We organize sketch meetups, graffiti exhibitions, concerts, and freestyle battles.
home.paragraph4: We are open to all kinds of proposals from anyone wanting to collaborate with us locally or nationally.
home.paragraph5: Several sponsors and venues in Valencia support this movement and help us run these activities.
home.paragraph6: We also promote the artists involved in our projects through visual content on different social media.
home.paragraph7: Don't hesitate to join us and become part of our family.

battle.rulesDescription1: Throughout the year we run several "Sketch Battles", where any of our followers from anywhere in the world can participate by sending us their best sketch.
battle.rulesDescription2: The chosen judges will evaluate the submissions and the winner will receive a great prize bundle.
battle.rulesDescription3: Battle rules may vary depending on the format chosen by the judges.
battle.rulesDescription4: Both the judges and the prizes will be announced before each battle.
battle.requirement2: Post a Story of your sketch, mentioning us and writing Sketch Battle.
battle.requirement3: Register on this website before the indicated date.
battle.farewell: Don't hesitate to join and keep an eye on our posts!
battle.uploadInstructions: Upload your sketch to the website, filling in the name and description fields, and writing Sketch Battle # 1 in the last field
battle.formatDescription: DIN A4 paper, landscape and in color. Signed as Sketch Battle # 2
battle.checkBackSoon: We'll announce the next one soon — don't miss it!
battle.noSubmissionsYet: No sketches yet in this battle. Be the first!
battle.noPastBattles: No finished battles yet. History is being written!
battle.viewLive: This is the current battle — go to the live page

sponsors.pageDescription: The brands, venues, and people who make this movement possible. Without them, none of this happens.
sponsors.mainSponsorsDescription: Brands that make every Share Your Sketch edition possible
sponsors.localsDescription: Bars, spaces, and businesses in Valencia that open their doors to us
sponsors.brandsDescription: Brands that contribute products for prizes and experiences
sponsors.mediaDescription: Platforms that help us reach more artists
sponsors.thanks: Thanks to everyone for making this possible! 🙌
sponsors.becomeOne: Want to be a sponsor? Reach out via the contact page.

contact.pageDescription: Want to collaborate, sponsor us, or just say hi? We're listening.
contact.emailDescription: For any question, proposal, or collaboration
contact.instagramDescription: Follow us so you don't miss what's happening
contact.telegramDescription: Quick updates about events and battles
contact.whatsappDescription: For faster or more personal topics
contact.locationDescription: Our base. Events usually happen here.
contact.responseTime: We answer as fast as we can 🤘
contact.responseDisclaimer: Usually within 24-48 hours. If urgent, IG is fastest.
